parameters.content:
## 📡 RoleRadar — Phase 2 · Score & Filter

AI-scores every new job against your profile (0–100), runs a **configurable language gate**, and shortlists the best.

**In:** `Jobs` (status = `New`)  •  **Out:** `Jobs` (`Shortlisted` / `Low Score` / `Needs Review`)
**Model:** `Load Config` → `SCORING_MODEL`
**Language gate:** `LANGUAGE_GATE` = `off` | `english_only` | `exclude`  (+ `EXCLUDE_LANGUAGES`)

— github.com/damran/role-radar

assignments.name: candidate_profile
assignments.value:
Name: Alex Mercer
Current Title: Senior Security Engineer / Detection & Response Lead
Location: Berlin, Germany
Languages: English (Fluent/Professional), German (Intermediate B1/B2)
Experience: 12+ years in Cybersecurity, SOC, and Detection Engineering

[EXECUTIVE SUMMARY]
Senior cybersecurity engineer with 12+ years building and scaling Security Operations Centers (SOC) across cloud and enterprise environments. Track record of deploying multi-cloud SOC infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP), tuning SIEM pipelines, and cutting incident response times. Strong in migrating manual security workflows to Detection-as-Code using Terraform and CI/CD. Hands-on across incident response, threat hunting, and infrastructure hardening.

[CORE COMPETENCIES]
- Security Operations: Multi-cloud SOC, Detection Engineering, Incident Response, Threat Hunting, Purple Teaming
- Cloud & Automation: AWS, GCP, Azure, Detection-as-Code, Terraform, GitHub CI/CD, Python, Bash
- SIEM & EDR: Sumo Logic, Splunk, SentinelOne, ELK Stack
- Network & AppSec: Cloudflare WAF, F5 BigIP ASM/APM, Checkpoint Firewalls, Cisco ISE (NAC), IDS/IPS (Zeek, Suricata)
- PKI & Email Security: AD PKI infrastructure, DMARC/DKIM/SPF policies
- Threat Intelligence: MISP integration, DNS Firewall, open-source threat feeds

[PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE]
1. Nimbus Retail GmbH | Berlin, Germany | Senior Security Engineer (2021 - Present)
- Built the company's first multi-cloud SOC with centralized SIEM (Sumo Logic) across AWS, Azure, and GCP
- Authored 150+ custom detection rules; automated alerting via Slack/Jira/PagerDuty
- Drove Detection-as-Code (Terraform + GitHub CI/CD), cutting deployment errors by ~85%
- Reduced SIEM ingestion cost by ~20% while improving coverage
- Hardened applications and endpoints via Cloudflare WAF tuning and SentinelOne EDR optimization

2. Helios Defense Systems | Remote/EU | Lead Security Engineer (2013 - 2021)
- Secured mission-critical multi-tier networks to strict compliance standards
- Architected F5 BigIP ASM (WAF), Checkpoint Firewalls, and Cisco ISE for NAC
- Deployed Network Security Monitoring with Security Onion and Zeek
- Built a layered AD PKI infrastructure
- Stood up MISP-based threat intelligence integrated with the wider security stack
- Authored DMARC/DKIM/SPF policies that significantly reduced phishing

[CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION]
- B.Sc. Computer Engineering
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- HashiCorp Terraform Associate
- Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
